title: Tern - no charge case screens (Onboarding, Tutorial screen)
scenario: Onboarding tutorial flow on Voyager Free 60+ does not display smart charge case screens when starting from Tutorial screen
steps: 2. Ensure a Voyager Free 60+ device is connected.
5. Observe the screens displayed during the onboarding/tutorial flow.
expected: Smart charge case screens should be displayed during the onboarding/tutorial flow.
